title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Research Scientist, Programmer Posts
organization: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
short_info: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Project Research Scientist II (Medical) Notification 2026 has been released on 18 May 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Delhi. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist II (Medical) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Research Scientist II (Medical): 25-40 years, Research Scientist I (Non-Medical): 18-35 years, Programmer: 18-35 years
age_limit.details: Research Scientist II (Medical): 25-40 years Research Scientist I (Non-Medical): 18-35 years Programmer: 18-35 years

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS / BDS, (MD/ MDS or MBBS, PhD / BDS with MPH with PhD, Post Graduate Degree/ PhD in Biostatistic or B.E./B.Tech
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist II (Medical): MBBS / BDS with three years' post qualification research experience. OR MBBS/BDS + Post Graduate Degree (MD/ MDS (Community Dentistry)/MPH) OR MBBS, PhD / BDS with MPH with PhD. Project Research Scientist I (Non-Medical): Post Graduate Degree/ PhD in Biostatistics OR demography. Desirable: Experience in Demography studies. Experience in managing large cohorts. Programmer: Master's degree in Computer Application / Information Technology / Computer Science from a recognized Institution/University/Institute OR B.E./B.Tech in Computer Engineering / Computer Science / Computer Technology / Information Technology from a recognized institution/university with organization. Desirable: Excellent command on Express/FastAPI, Flutter, PostGresQL, Ubuntu. Experience in REST API development, Offline First workflows, data collection, management, and analysis. Experience in MVC application development. Two years' experience in relevant areas of hands on in Express / Python / Flutter programming in Government, autonomous, PSU etc.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
